title: Privacy Policy
content_html:
Effective Date: [January 16th, 2026]

Eagle Wings Services Ltd is committed to protecting the privacy and personal information of our clients, partners, website visitors, job applicants, and service users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website www.e-wingss.com or engage our services.

1. Company Information

Company Name: Eagle Wings Services Ltd
Address: Mile 2, Limbe, Cameroon
Email: info@e-wingss.com
Phone: (+237) 6 79 22 64 48

2. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

a. Personal Information

  • Full name

  • Email address

  • Phone number

  • Company name and job title

  • Address and location details

  • CVs, qualifications, and employment history (for manpower recruitment)

b. Business & Service Information

  • Service inquiries and project details

  • Procurement and logistics information

  • Safety consultancy and training data

  • Import/export documentation details

c. Technical Information

  • IP address

  • Browser type and version

  • Device information

  • Website usage data (via cookies and analytics tools)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to:

  • Provide manpower placement and recruitment services

  • Deliver safety consultancy, training, and compliance services

  • Manage procurement, logistics, and supply chain services

  • Respond to inquiries and customer support requests

  • Process job applications and onboarding

  • Improve website functionality and user experience

  • Comply with legal and regulatory obligations

4. Legal Basis for Processing

We process personal data based on:

  • Your consent

  • Contractual necessity

  • Legal obligations

  • Legitimate business interests

5. Information Sharing & Disclosure

We do not sell or rent personal information. We may share information only with:

  • Clients requiring manpower or consultancy services

  • Trusted service providers and partners

  • Regulatory authorities where legally required

  • Internal staff strictly for service delivery purposes

All third parties are required to maintain confidentiality and data protection standards.

6. Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect personal information against:

  • Unauthorized access

  • Loss or misuse

  • Disclosure or alteration

While we strive to protect your data, no online transmission is 100% secure.

7. Data Retention

We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to:

  • Fulfill service obligations

  • Meet legal, contractual, or regulatory requirements

  • Maintain business records

Recruitment data may be retained for future opportunities unless you request deletion.

8. Cookies & Tracking Technologies

Our website may use cookies to:

  • Improve website performance

  • Analyze traffic and user behavior

  • Enhance user experience

You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings.

9. Your Privacy Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access your personal data

  • Request correction or updates

  • Request deletion of your data

  • Withdraw consent at any time

  • Object to certain data processing activities

To exercise these rights, contact us at info@e-wingss.com.

10. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those external sites.

11. International Data Transfers

Where necessary, your information may be transferred or processed outside Cameroon in connection with international clients or partners. Appropriate safeguards will be applied.

12. Updates to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

13. Contact Us

If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please contact us:

📧 info@e-wingss.com
📞 (+237) 6 79 22 64 48
📍 Mile 2, Limbe, Cameroon

About Eagle Wings Services

Eagle Wings Services Ltd is a dynamic and reliable company specializing in Manpower Placement and Safety Consultancy & Training. We are committed to delivering professional solutions that meet the workforce needs of businesses while upholding the highest standards of safety across various industries.

With a strong focus on excellence, integrity, and efficiency, Eagle Wings Services bridges the gap between skilled talent and organizations in need of qualified personnel. Our manpower services cover recruitment, placement, and workforce management for both short-term and long-term projects.

Read More...

Our Services

Detailed Safety Inspections

Detailed Safety Inspections involve thorough examination of workplaces, equipment, and operations to identify hazards, non-compliance issues, and unsafe practices.

Read More

Workplace Safety Audits

Workplace Safety Audits are systematic evaluations of an organization’s safety systems, policies, and practices to ensure effectiveness and compliance.

Read More

Safety Policy Development

Safety Policy Development involves creating clear, structured, and compliant safety policies that guide safe behavior and operations within an organization.

Read More Read More... OUR SHOWCASE

Client-focused service delivery
Strong ethical and professional culture

OUR CLIENTS REVIEW

Eagle Wings Services Ltd provided us with skilled manpower and strong safety support on our project. Their professionalism and attention to safety standards were impressive. I highly recommend their services.

title: Faq
content_html:
Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

General Information

Manpower Placement Services

Safety Consultancy & Compliance

Eagle Wings Services Ltd provides Manpower Placement, and Consultancy & Safety Trainings services, including staffing solutions and workplace safety management support.

We serve a wide range of industries including construction, oil & gas, manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, corporate offices, and retail & distribution.

Yes. We offer temporary, permanent, and contract-based manpower solutions tailored to meet short-term project needs and long-term workforce requirements.

All candidates undergo screening, verification, and selection processes to ensure they meet the required skills, experience, and professional standards before deployment.

Our safety consultancy services include risk assessments, regulatory compliance support, safety policy development, workplace safety audits, incident investigation, emergency preparedness planning, and safety training programs.

Yes. Our safety solutions are designed to comply with local regulations and international safety standards, helping clients avoid legal risks and maintain safe working environments.

Absolutely. All our services are customized based on the client’s industry, operational needs, workforce size, and regulatory requirements.

Yes. We provide regulatory compliance support, documentation assistance, and guidance to help organizations prepare for and successfully pass safety inspections and audits.

Yes. Through our workforce outsourcing solutions, we manage recruitment, deployment, payroll coordination, and workforce supervision, allowing clients to focus on their core operations.

You can contact us via phone, email, or our website to request a consultation or quotation. Our team will assess your needs and provide a tailored solution promptly.
📞 Phone: (+237) 679 226 448
📧 Email: info@e-wingss.com
🌐 Website: www.e-wingss.com [forminator_form id="7255"]
content_text:
Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

General Information

Manpower Placement Services

Safety Consultancy & Compliance

What services does Eagle Wings Services Ltd offer? 

Eagle Wings Services Ltd provides Manpower Placement, and Consultancy & Safety Trainings services, including staffing solutions and workplace safety management support. 

Which industries do you serve? 

We serve a wide range of industries including construction, oil & gas, manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, corporate offices, and retail & distribution. 

Do you provide both temporary and permanent staffing? 

Yes. We offer temporary, permanent, and contract-based manpower solutions tailored to meet short-term project needs and long-term workforce requirements. 

How do you ensure the quality of manpower you supply? 

All candidates undergo screening, verification, and selection processes to ensure they meet the required skills, experience, and professional standards before deployment. 

What is included in your safety consultancy services? 

Our safety consultancy services include risk assessments, regulatory compliance support, safety policy development, workplace safety audits, incident investigation, emergency preparedness planning, and safety training programs. 

Do your safety services comply with regulatory standards? 

Yes. Our safety solutions are designed to comply with local regulations and international safety standards, helping clients avoid legal risks and maintain safe working environments. 

Can you customize safety training and manpower solutions? 

Absolutely. All our services are customized based on the client’s industry, operational needs, workforce size, and regulatory requirements. 

Do you support companies during safety inspections and audits? 

Yes. We provide regulatory compliance support, documentation assistance, and guidance to help organizations prepare for and successfully pass safety inspections and audits. 

Do you offer outsourcing and workforce management services? 

Yes. Through our workforce outsourcing solutions, we manage recruitment, deployment, payroll coordination, and workforce supervision, allowing clients to focus on their core operations. 

How can I request a consultation or service quotation? 

You can contact us via phone, email, or our website to request a consultation or quotation. Our team will assess your needs and provide a tailored solution promptly.

📞 Phone: (+237) 679 226 448

📧 Email: info@e-wingss.com

🌐 Website: www.e-wingss.com

title: About
content_html:
10 +
Years of experience

About Eagle Wings Services

Eagle Wings Services Ltd is a dynamic and reliable company specializing in Manpower Placement and Safety Consultancy & Training. We are committed to delivering professional solutions that meet the workforce needs of businesses while upholding the highest standards of safety across various industries.

With a strong focus on excellence, integrity, and efficiency, Eagle Wings Services bridges the gap between skilled talent and organizations in need of qualified personnel. Our manpower services cover recruitment, placement, and workforce management for both short-term and long-term projects.

In addition, our Safety Consultancy services are designed to help organizations build and maintain safe working environments. We provide expert guidance on workplace safety policies, risk assessments, safety training, and compliance with local and international standards.

At Eagle Wings Services Ltd, we believe in empowering businesses with the right people and safe practices to ensure sustainable growth and success.

Expert Electrician
Safety Assurance

Our Vision

To become a leading manpower and safety consultancy company in Cameroon and beyond, recognized for professionalism, reliability, and impact.

title: Regulatory Compliance Support
content_html:
Regulatory Compliance Support helps organizations meet all local and international safety, labor, and operational regulations required by law and industry standards

Short Notes:

- Guidance on compliance with health, safety, labor, and environmental regulations
- Identification of legal gaps and non-compliance risks
- Support in meeting government, industry, and client safety requirements
- Preparation for inspections, audits, and certifications
- Assistance with documentation, permits, and compliance reports
- Reduces legal risks, penalties, and operational disruptions

Key Benefit:

Ensures your business operates legally, safely, and confidently
content_text:

Short Notes: 

- Guidance on compliance with health, safety, labor, and environmental regulations

- Support in meeting government, industry, and client safety requirements

- Preparation for inspections, audits, and certifications

- Assistance with documentation, permits, and compliance reports

- Reduces legal risks, penalties, and operational disruptions 

Key Benefit: 

Ensures your business operates legally, safely, and confidently

title: Risk Assessment & Hazard Identification
content_html:
Risk Assessment & Hazard Identification involves systematically identifying workplace hazards and evaluating risks to prevent accidents, injuries, and operational losses.

Short Notes:

- Identification of physical, chemical, biological, and operational hazards
- Evaluation of risk levels and potential impact on workers and assets
- Job Safety Analysis (JSA) and task-based risk assessments
- Development of control measures to eliminate or reduce risks
- Compliance with safety regulations and best practices
- Improves employee awareness and accident prevention

Key Benefit:

Creates a safer work environment by preventing incidents before they occur

title: Emergency Preparedness & Response Planning
content_html:
Emergency Preparedness & Response Planning ensures organizations are fully ready to respond effectively to emergencies, minimizing injuries, damage, and downtime.

Short Notes:

- Development of customized emergency response plans
- Fire safety, evacuation, and emergency drill coordination
- First aid and basic life support preparedness
- Identification of emergency risks and response procedures
- Training staff on emergency roles and responsibilities
- Coordination with local emergency services where required

Key Benefit:

Protects lives and assets through fast, organized emergency response
content_text:
Emergency Preparedness & Response Planning ensures organizations are fully ready to respond effectively to emergencies, minimizing injuries, damage, and downtime.

Short Notes: 

- Development of customized emergency response plans

- Fire safety, evacuation, and emergency drill coordination

- First aid and basic life support preparedness

- Identification of emergency risks and response procedures

- Training staff on emergency roles and responsibilities

- Coordination with local emergency services where required 

Key Benefit: 

Protects lives and assets through fast, organized emergency response

title: Detailed Safety Inspections
content_html:
Detailed Safety Inspections involve thorough examination of workplaces, equipment, and operations to identify hazards, non-compliance issues, and unsafe practices.

Short Notes:

- Comprehensive inspection of work areas, machinery, tools, and processes
- Identification of unsafe conditions and unsafe acts
- Evaluation of compliance with safety policies and regulations
- Documentation of findings with corrective action recommendations
- Support for continuous safety improvement and risk reduction
- Helps prevent accidents, injuries, and operational downtime

Key Benefit:

Detects and corrects safety issues before they lead to incidents

title: Workplace Safety Audits
content_html:
Workplace Safety Audits are systematic evaluations of an organization’s safety systems, policies, and practices to ensure effectiveness and compliance.

Short Notes:

- Review of safety policies, procedures, and documentation
- Assessment of workplace conditions and operational practices
- Evaluation of employee safety awareness and training
- Identification of gaps, risks, and non-compliance issues
- Detailed audit reports with improvement recommendations
- Supports continuous improvement and regulatory compliance

Key Benefit:

Strengthens safety systems and ensures ongoing compliance

title: Safety Policy Development
content_html:
Safety Policy Development involves creating clear, structured, and compliant safety policies that guide safe behavior and operations within an organization.

Short Notes:

- Development of customized safety policies aligned with company operations
- Compliance with local and international safety regulations
- Clear definition of safety roles, responsibilities, and procedures
- Integration of safety culture across all levels of the organization
- Documentation for audits, inspections, and regulatory requirements
- Continuous review and updates to reflect operational changes

Key Benefit:

Establishes a strong safety culture and clear safety direction

title: Incident Investigation & Reporting
content_html:
Incident Investigation & Reporting focuses on identifying the root causes of workplace incidents to prevent recurrence and improve overall safety performance.

Short Notes:

- Investigation of accidents, near-misses, and unsafe incidents
- Root cause analysis to determine underlying factors
- Collection of evidence, witness statements, and observations
- Preparation of detailed incident and investigation reports
- Recommendations for corrective and preventive actions
- Support for regulatory and insurance reporting requirements

Key Benefit:

Prevents repeat incidents and strengthens workplace safety systems

title: Temporary & Permanent Staffing
content_html:
Temporary & Permanent Staffing services provide businesses with qualified and reliable personnel to meet both short-term operational needs and long-term workforce goals.

Short Notes:

- Supply of skilled and semi-skilled workers for various industries
- Temporary staffing for projects, peak periods, and urgent needs
- Permanent recruitment for long-term roles and organizational growth
- Candidate screening, selection, and placement
- Flexible staffing solutions tailored to business requirements
- Reduced recruitment time and operational costs

Key Benefit:

Ensures the right talent is available at the right time

- Scalable manpower solutions for project-based operations

title: Manpower Supplies
content_html:
Our Manpower Supply Categories

Responsible for supervising drilling operations on the rig, operating drilling equipment, and ensuring drilling activities are carried out safely, efficiently, and in compliance with operational procedures.

Supports the Driller in managing drilling operations, monitoring drilling parameters, coordinating the drill crew, and maintaining well control and safety standards.

Operates and maintains drilling fluids systems, works at height on the derrick, and assists with tripping pipe and maintaining mud properties during drilling operations.

Performs general rig floor duties including handling drill pipe, operating rig equipment, assisting with tripping operations, and maintaining a clean and safe work environment.

Supports rig floor operations by assisting with equipment handling, pipe movements, maintenance tasks, and ensuring adherence to safety procedures.

Leads mechanical maintenance activities, supervises mechanics, plans preventive maintenance, and ensures mechanical system reliability.

Conducts maintenance, repairs, and inspections of mechanical equipment to ensure safe and efficient operation.

Assists in maintaining engines, pumps, compressors, and mechanical systems, supporting routine checks and repairs.

Oversees all electrical systems, supervises electrical personnel, ensures compliance with electrical standards, and manages power distribution.

Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical wiring, equipment, and control systems while ensuring safety compliance.

Maintains and troubleshoots electronic control systems, automation equipment, communication systems, and instrumentation.

Assists in operating and maintaining marine engines, generators, and auxiliary systems, ensuring safe and efficient vessel performance.

Supervises deck operations, coordinates deck crew activities, ensures safe lifting and mooring operations, and enforces marine safety standards.

Operates offshore and onshore cranes to safely lift, move, and position materials and equipment, following approved lifting plans and safety procedures.

Provides general labor support on deck and site, including cargo handling, equipment cleaning, rigging assistance, and housekeeping tasks.

Manages permit-to-work systems, coordinates approvals, ensures compliance with safety procedures, and supports safe execution of work activities.

Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical systems and equipment, ensuring continuous power supply and compliance with safety standards.

Performs maintenance, troubleshooting, and repairs on mechanical equipment to ensure operational reliability and efficiency.

Installs, calibrates, and maintains instrumentation and control systems used in monitoring and regulating production processes.

Carry out rigging, lifting, and load-handling activities, ensuring safe attachment, movement, and positioning of equipment and materials.

Perform welding and fabrication tasks on structural, piping, and mechanical components in accordance with engineering drawings and safety standards.

Operates and monitors engines, generators, and auxiliary machinery, ensuring safe and continuous power and propulsion systems.

Maintains and repairs refrigeration and HVAC systems to ensure proper cooling, food storage, and environmental comfort.

Coordinates material movement, inventory control, and supply chain activities to ensure timely availability of equipment and consumables.

Perform inspection, maintenance, and repair work at height using rope access techniques while adhering to strict safety procedures.

Erect, modify, and dismantle scaffolding structures to provide safe access for work activities at height.

Carry out surface preparation, coating, and painting works for corrosion protection and structural preservation.

Implements health, safety, and environmental policies, conducts inspections, monitors compliance, and promotes a strong safety culture.

Manages communication systems, ensures clear and reliable communication between teams, and maintains radio logs.

Provides first aid, emergency medical response, health monitoring, and medical support for personnel on site.

Handles administrative duties including reporting, documentation, personnel records, and coordination of rig logistics.

Supervises camp operations, catering services, accommodation, hygiene, and welfare activities to ensure staff comfort.

Plans and prepares nutritious meals, manages kitchen operations, and ensures food safety and hygiene standards.

Assists the chef in food preparation, cooking, and kitchen operations while maintaining cleanliness.

Support catering operations by serving meals, cleaning dining areas, and maintaining accommodation standards.

Handles laundry services, ensuring clean and hygienic clothing and linens for personnel.

content_text:
Our Manpower Supply Categories

DRILLING OPERATIONS 

PRODUCTION & OPERATIONS TEAM 

SAFETY, MEDICAL & ADMINISTRATIVE SUPPORT 

CATERING & WELFARE SERVICES 

Driller 

Responsible for supervising drilling operations on the rig, operating drilling equipment, and ensuring drilling activities are carried out safely, efficiently, and in compliance with operational procedures. 

Assistant Driller 

Supports the Driller in managing drilling operations, monitoring drilling parameters, coordinating the drill crew, and maintaining well control and safety standards. 

Derrickman 

Operates and maintains drilling fluids systems, works at height on the derrick, and assists with tripping pipe and maintaining mud properties during drilling operations. 

Roughneck 

Performs general rig floor duties including handling drill pipe, operating rig equipment, assisting with tripping operations, and maintaining a clean and safe work environment. 

Floorman 

Supports rig floor operations by assisting with equipment handling, pipe movements, maintenance tasks, and ensuring adherence to safety procedures. 

Chief Mechanic 

Leads mechanical maintenance activities, supervises mechanics, plans preventive maintenance, and ensures mechanical system reliability. 

Mechanic 

Conducts maintenance, repairs, and inspections of mechanical equipment to ensure safe and efficient operation. 

Motorman 

Assists in maintaining engines, pumps, compressors, and mechanical systems, supporting routine checks and repairs. 

Chief Electrician 

Oversees all electrical systems, supervises electrical personnel, ensures compliance with electrical standards, and manages power distribution. 

Electrician 

Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical wiring, equipment, and control systems while ensuring safety compliance. 

Electronic Technician (ET) 

Maintains and troubleshoots electronic control systems, automation equipment, communication systems, and instrumentation. 

Assistant Barge Engineer 

Assists in operating and maintaining marine engines, generators, and auxiliary systems, ensuring safe and efficient vessel performance. 

Deck Foreman 

Supervises deck operations, coordinates deck crew activities, ensures safe lifting and mooring operations, and enforces marine safety standards. 

Crane Operator 

Operates offshore and onshore cranes to safely lift, move, and position materials and equipment, following approved lifting plans and safety procedures. 

Roustabout 

Provides general labor support on deck and site, including cargo handling, equipment cleaning, rigging assistance, and housekeeping tasks. 

Permit Coordinator 

Manages permit-to-work systems, coordinates approvals, ensures compliance with safety procedures, and supports safe execution of work activities. 

Electrical Technician 

Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical systems and equipment, ensuring continuous power supply and compliance with safety standards. 

Mechanical Technician 

Performs maintenance, troubleshooting, and repairs on mechanical equipment to ensure operational reliability and efficiency. 

Instrument Technician 

Installs, calibrates, and maintains instrumentation and control systems used in monitoring and regulating production processes. 

Deck Crew / Riggers 

Carry out rigging, lifting, and load-handling activities, ensuring safe attachment, movement, and positioning of equipment and materials. 

Welders / Fabricators 

Perform welding and fabrication tasks on structural, piping, and mechanical components in accordance with engineering drawings and safety standards. 

Engine Room Operator 

Operates and monitors engines, generators, and auxiliary machinery, ensuring safe and continuous power and propulsion systems. 

Refrigeration Technician 

Maintains and repairs refrigeration and HVAC systems to ensure proper cooling, food storage, and environmental comfort. 

Logistics / Material Coordinator 

Coordinates material movement, inventory control, and supply chain activities to ensure timely availability of equipment and consumables. 

Rope Access Technicians (Levels 1, 2 & 3) 

Perform inspection, maintenance, and repair work at height using rope access techniques while adhering to strict safety procedures. 

Scaffolders 

Erect, modify, and dismantle scaffolding structures to provide safe access for work activities at height. 

Painters 

Carry out surface preparation, coating, and painting works for corrosion protection and structural preservation. 

HSE Officer 

Implements health, safety, and environmental policies, conducts inspections, monitors compliance, and promotes a strong safety culture. 

Radio Operator 

Manages communication systems, ensures clear and reliable communication between teams, and maintains radio logs. 

Medic 

Provides first aid, emergency medical response, health monitoring, and medical support for personnel on site. 

Rig Clerk / Administrator 

Handles administrative duties including reporting, documentation, personnel records, and coordination of rig logistics. 

Camp Boss 

Supervises camp operations, catering services, accommodation, hygiene, and welfare activities to ensure staff comfort. 

Chef 

Plans and prepares nutritious meals, manages kitchen operations, and ensures food safety and hygiene standards. 

Cook 

Assists the chef in food preparation, cooking, and kitchen operations while maintaining cleanliness. 

Stewards 

Support catering operations by serving meals, cleaning dining areas, and maintaining accommodation standards. 

Laundryman 

Handles laundry services, ensuring clean and hygienic clothing and linens for personnel.
